description: Shopping cart management - add items, view cart, remove items. Requires authentication.
authentication: Bearer JWT token required for all endpoints

endpoints.name: Add To Cart
endpoints.description: Add a product to the shopping cart with optional quantity

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when user clicks 'Add to Cart' button on product page. Validates stock availability before adding.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast 'Added to cart', updates cart badge count in header, button may show loading spinner during request

endpoints.name: Get Cart
endpoints.description: Retrieve all items in the user's shopping cart

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays list of cart items with product image, name, price, quantity, and remove button. Shows cart total.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Cart page showing product cards with image, name, unit price, quantity controls, subtotal per item, and overall cart total at bottom with 'Proceed to Checkout' button

endpoints.name: Remove From Cart
endpoints.description: Remove a product from the shopping cart

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when user clicks the remove/delete button (X icon) on a cart item

productId.description: Product ID to remove from cart

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Item smoothly disappears from cart list with animation, cart total recalculates, cart badge count decrements
